mapper.insert:
insert into ys_tb.ys_user(id, username, password, age, sex, balance, email, tel, status, create_time) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.username}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.sex}, #{entity.balance}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.tel}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createTime})

insert into ys_tb.ys_user(id, username, password, age, sex, balance, email, tel, status, create_time) values (#{entity.id}, #{entity.username}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.sex}, #{entity.balance}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.tel}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createTime})

insert into ys_tb.ys_user(id, username, password, age, sex, balance, email, tel, status, create_time) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.username}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.sex}, #{entity.balance}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.tel}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createTime})
on duplicate key update id = values(id) , username = values(username) , password = values(password) , age = values(age) , sex = values(sex) , balance = values(balance) , email = values(email) , tel = values(tel), status = values(status), create_time = values(create_time)
mapper.select: select * from ys_tb.ys_user where username=#{username} and password=#{password}
select * from ys_tb.ys_user where username=#{username} limit 1
select * from ys_tb.ys_user where email=#{email} limit 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ys_user set balance=#{ysUser.balance} WHERE id = #{ysUser.id}
